name: Rayon from Bamboo Jersey Quilted Blanket - Leopard - Purple - Cloud Island™
description:
Keep your little one cool and comfy by covering them up with the Rayon from Bamboo Jersey Quilted Blanket from Cloud Island™. This printed baby blanket is covered with leopard print for a delightful look they'll love. Made of rayon from bamboo, this quilted blanket has a cooling feature to keep them nice and comfy. Great for adding to your little one's essentials, it also makes a great gift at baby showers.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
